---
title: "Known Limitations"
description: "Visible boundaries of the current OPALX implementation and documentation."
audience: user
status: experimental
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

- OPALX is not documented as a drop-in implementation of every historical
  OPAL flavor. OPAL-CYCL and OPAL-MAP material is not part of this manual.
- Attribute-level command and element tables are incomplete where source and
  regression behavior have not yet been reconciled.
- Some physics chapters document recently implemented models whose interface
  may still change; these pages are marked `experimental`.
- Field-solver and output-format matrices are still planned.
- Backend support must be checked for each new algorithm; successful serial
  execution does not establish GPU support.

These limitations are documentation status, not a substitute for the issue
tracker. Report unexpected implemented behavior with a reproducible case.
